prompt: A 3D anime-style illustration of four high school girls in a Japanese classroom bathed in warm afternoon sunlight. In the foreground on the right, a girl with long coral-brown hair in a ponytail with a white bow and green eyes reaches her hand out towards the viewer with a warm smile. In the foreground on the left, a girl with short pink hair with red hairclips and pink eyes stands with her arms crossed, looking slightly annoyed. In the midground, a girl with long dark purple hair stands calmly holding a book, while in the background, a girl with short coral-pink hair and a red bow waves cheerfully. All four girls wear matching school uniforms consisting of grey blazers, brown sweater vests, red ribbons, and blue pleated skirts. The classroom features wooden floors, desks, and a green chalkboard. In the top left corner, there is a circular logo with a pink border containing the stylized text "DOKI DOKI Literature Club!" and a large pink "3D" below it, decorated with a green pencil and a pink heart. The image has a high-quality 3D render aesthetic, resembling video game promotional art with soft lighting and depth of field.
